title: Horizontal Manual Scaling for a Deployment — Scaling up a Deployment
text:
There are several different ways you can change the replica count for an
existing Deployment.

Use
kubectl scale
to set the replica count:
kubectl scale deployment/nginx-deployment --replicas
=
4
The output is similar to:
deployment.apps/nginx-deployment scaled
Verify that the Deployment has four Pods:
kubectl get deployment nginx-deployment
The output is similar to:
NAME               READY   UP-TO-DATE   AVAILABLE   AGE
nginx-deployment   4/4     4            4           1m
